title: Monthly Report KPI tiles hardcoded to e-shop metrics (Obrat/ROAS/PNO) — not type-aware, while the Overview already is
expected: Report tiles adapt to project type the way the Overview does (Leady/CPL/Konv. poměr for leadgen; Poptávky & hovory/Cena za poptávku for local)
got: REPORT_TILES is a static const = revenue/roas/pno/conversions/cost/visits; the page writes those into snap.current regardless of project.type; a leadgen/local client report headlines fabricated 'Obrat'/'ROAS'
code_check: confirmed-absent: REPORT_TILES/ReportMetric appear in exactly 3 files (compute.ts, MonthlyReport.tsx, one test); page.tsx never branches on project.type. KPI_PRESETS is type-aware (modules.ts:432-449) but the report ignores it. Reconciliation confirmed.
ceiling: Drive tiles from KPI_PRESETS[type] -> client-legible per-type report; without it the tiles read as another business

title: /cena tells every visitor it is a 'case study', Stripe not wired, paid CTAs are mailto: — product says it can't be bought
expected: A live-product pricing page a buyer can act on (trial/waitlist that reads as real)
got: Public disclaimer 'Případová studie: platební brána (Stripe) není napojená'; paid CTAs are mailto: links
code_check: confirmed-present. Note: likely intentional (no payment integration yet), but it directly confirms the buyer's 'portfolio not product' pet peeve and kills purchase intent.
ceiling: A 'start trial / join waitlist' that reads as a live product removes the portfolio smell

title: T3 STILL OPEN — client-facing shared report /report/[token] leaks internal AI chrome (model pill, USD cost pill, 'show prompt' box)
expected: A white-label client report shows no vendor/model/cost/prompt; a client-safe toggle exists
got: ResultMeta renders model badge + '~$0.xxxx' cost pill; PromptDisclosure shows 'Zobrazit prompt poslaný modelu' + copy-prompt; all render on the public token page; no clientSafe/hide prop anywhere
code_check: confirmed-present. Reconciliation: grep for clientSafe/hideChrome/hideMeta finds no such mechanism on ReportView/primitives (matches only in unrelated files). Fixed on the new MonthlyReport surface, unresolved on the shared microsite.
ceiling: Add a clientSafe flag that hides ResultMeta + PromptDisclosure on public surfaces -> handable untouched

title: Uploaded brand logo (Phase 2) renders on ZERO client-facing surfaces — persisted + previewed only
expected: Logo shows in the client report / microsite header (the module's own promise, types.ts:167 'shown on client-facing reports')
got: logoUrl is consumed only by the Branding module preview + persistence; MonthlyReport renders projectName text only; /report/[token], /m/[slug], ReportView, shared-report, microsite never read it
code_check: confirmed-absent. Reconciliation grep: logoUrl appears ONLY in BrandingModule.tsx, api/projects/[id]/route.ts, branding/page.tsx, store.firestore.ts, store.local.ts, types.ts — NOT in any client-facing render path. NOTE: Marta's report claimed the logo reaches the header (M6); that is refuted by the grep — she conflated the Branding live preview with the report.
ceiling: Capture logoUrl into SharedReport + render in report/microsite/print headers -> the marquee white-label feature actually works

title: Hardcoded 'Mionelo' demo identity leaks into AI output, fallbacks, and the public proof band
expected: AI output and public proof carry the caller's own brand (or an obviously-fictional one); no competitor brand in generated posts
got: Template/skipped-platform social drafts emit 'V Mionelo…', '#mionelo', 'mionelo.cz'; monthly-recap demo fallback appends a vendor sentence; homepage proof band + demo use the real brand 'Mionelo' as case-study client
code_check: confirmed-present across multiple call sites. Homepage/proof is labeled illustrative (lower severity there); the social template/fallback leak into user output is the sharp edge.
ceiling: Inject the active project's brand into fallbacks + use a fictional case-study identity -> no foreign brand ever reaches user or public output

title: Social 'what's working' grounding is a fixed demo dataset, not the project's data (wrong tenant)
expected: 'Grounded in what's performing' pulls the active project's own performance
got: perfGrounding builds from buildSnapshot('90d') with no data arg, so it uses the default case-study performance (Mionelo) injected into every project
code_check: confirmed. The data seam (buildSnapshot(..., data)) exists but the social route never passes the project dataset.
ceiling: Pass getProjectDataset(project) into perfGrounding -> 'what's working' is genuinely this brand's data

title: AI grounding snapshot is e-commerce-shaped (Obrat/ROAS/AOV/channel table) and contradicts the businessType label it is handed
expected: Type-aware snapshotToPromptText: lead/CPL/CVR labels for non-eshop; local signals for local
got: The DATA block hard-labels 'Obrat (hodnota konverzí)', 'ROAS', 'Průměrná hodnota objednávky', channel 'obrat|podíl|PNO|ROAS' even when the system prompt says the client is leadgen/local
code_check: confirmed. The businessType label reaches only the prompt text; the numeric block that dominates it is e-shop. Best case the model ignores its data; worst case it reports revenue for a service business.
ceiling: Type-aware snapshotToPromptText -> the narrative is genuinely leadgen/local-native, not label-vs-data conflict

title: Report is ROAS/PNO-centric with no profit-after-COGS / POAS for a profit-first e-shop owner
expected: Profit after real costs (COGS/overhead), honest on thin margin — bankable numbers
got: Tiles = revenue/roas/pno/conversions/cost/visits; recap frames eshop as 'obratu, PNO a ROAS'; the /zisk (POAS) module exists but is never composed into the report; no COGS/margin field in the dataset
code_check: confirmed-absent. No cost-of-goods field in dataset.ts; zisk is a separate module never wired into the report.
ceiling: Compose POAS/margin (the zisk spine) into the report -> a report a profit-first owner would bank

title: Public demo silently swallows the Phase-1/3/4 surfaces (Spotřeba/Integrace/Účet) into the portfolio overview
expected: The buyer can inspect running cost, integrations, and security (even read-only) in the no-login demo
got: Sidebar links exist and titles are correct, but DemoModule has no case for spotreba/integrace/ucet -> falls to default = ProjectOverview; body shows a project list under the wrong title
code_check: confirmed. The three phases this run validates are, for the buyer persona, not reachable at all (auth-gated in-app, mislabeled in demo).
ceiling: Add read-only demo cases for the three modules -> the phase work builds buyer confidence instead of being invisible

title: Brand voice not grounded from the project — manual, empty-by-default, and absent from the Week Planner surface where she starts
expected: Brand/voice auto-grounded from the project (catalog/Offering spine), present where the batch starts
got: Brand-voice is a free-text localStorage field living in the Composer, empty by default with a Mionelo placeholder; WeekPlanner reads it but cannot set it, so first-run batches have brand=undefined
code_check: confirmed. Recognition-over-recall fail; even filled it is free-text recall, not real catalog grounding.
ceiling: Auto-derive voice from the Offering/catalog spine + surface it in WeekPlanner -> on-brand by default

title: No lead-quality/CPL/source-quality/speed-to-lead (or local map/reviews/GBP) grounding reaches the report
expected: The report answers the actual job: which lead sources are junk, CPL of qualified leads, speed-to-lead (leadgen); map coverage, reviews, GBP (local)
got: Dataset carries only revenue/cost/conversions/visits; the kvalita-leadu / reviews / map spines never flow into the client report
code_check: confirmed. Scoped to the report surface — the data exists in other modules but is not composed into the recap.
ceiling: Feed source-quality/CPL (leadgen) and coverage/reviews (local) into the recap -> a report a senior would sign

title: Brand identity split — buyer-facing contacts say both 'Systedo' and 'Adamant'
expected: Single consistent brand + domain across all contact points
got: cena page shows obchod@systedo.cz; AccountSecurity shows podpora@adamant.app
code_check: confirmed. A due-diligence buyer sees two company names.

title: Homepage hero hardcoded English for a Czech (cs) visitor
expected: Localized hero — value prop legible in the reader's language in seconds
got: Headline, subhead, CTAs ('See it work', 'Start free', 'Works across') are hardcoded English; only proof labels use the T() dictionary
code_check: confirmed. Part of the pending UI-string localization sweep.
ceiling: Localize the hero -> value prop legible for a cs reader

title: Microsite /m/[slug] publishes scaled demo numbers as SEO-indexed 'always-current proof' with no disclaimer
expected: Real (or clearly-labeled illustrative) data on an indexed proof page
got: Microsite is index:true with JSON-LD Dataset of concrete numbers that are deterministically scaled demo data (seedScale(slug)), presented as real client results, no disclaimer anywhere (contrast MonthlyReport which does disclaim)
code_check: confirmed. Low frequency (needs discovery via search) but a reputational/legal landmine for an agency — blocker on severity despite the modest numeric rank.
ceiling: Add an illustrative-data disclaimer + noindex demo slugs -> no fabricated proof under a client name

title: Speed-to-lead / enquiry-clock inbox has no home on a `local` project
expected: The 'no enquiry waits' inbox with a response clock reachable on Dentalis
got: rychla-reakce and kvalita-leadu are leadgen-only; ~1/3 of her stated JTBD is unreachable on a local project
code_check: confirmed. Her character maps_to speed-to-lead, so the hole is real for her journey.
ceiling: Make rychla-reakce available for local (or add a local enquiry inbox) -> the whole journey has a home

title: Monthly-report print/PDF export is itself unbranded (no logo, no accent) and prints internal AI section
expected: Branded print output for a 'client-ready recap'
got: MonthlyReport renders projectName heading only; no accent/logo; the 'Souhrn od AI' section + AI-disclaimer note print through
code_check: confirmed. Positioned as client-ready (modules.ts:343) but carries generic app styling.
ceiling: Apply logo/accent + a client-safe print mode -> branded PDF

title: Week planner drafts one platform per run — no cross-channel-per-topic batch
expected: IG/FB/TikTok differentiated captions per topic in one batch
got: To cover 3 channels she reruns the batch 3x over shared topics; Composer can multi-platform draft but can't batch-schedule
code_check: confirmed. The two capabilities (batch, multi-platform) don't compose.
ceiling: Batch across channels per topic -> a true cross-channel week in one run

title: Map & rankings is read-only illustrative data under a contradictory 'Živá mapa' (Live map) header
expected: Either a real/actionable map or consistent labeling
got: Header says 'Živá mapa' while the footer says 'Ilustrativní data'; read-only, no GBP/SERP integration
code_check: confirmed. Intentional Phase-6 ceiling but the header overstates.
ceiling: Reword header to 'Ukázková mapa' -> no live/illustrative contradiction

title: businessName passed as literal 'Dentalis (demo)' into the review-reply prompt
expected: Published-looking reply carries a clean business name
got: project.name '(demo)' suffix flows into the prompt which instructs 'mluv jeho jménem', so a reply can carry '(demo)'
code_check: confirmed. Demo project naming; real projects won't carry '(demo)'.
ceiling: Strip '(demo)' from names fed to prompts -> clean replies
